summary: First test run - All backend and frontend tests passed successfully. Backend API endpoints working correctly with 6 categories and 16 seeded locations. Frontend UI fully functional with category filtering, search, and location detail modal.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Using existing 16 locations seeded by backend on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend has 16 locations across 6 categories. Frontend category filter, search, and modal all functional. No issues found.

backend_tests_passed: Create and GET location (data persistence verified)
frontend_tests_passed: App loads with map and 16 location cards
Category filter can be toggled off
Modal shows: name, address, description, working hours, phone
